assertions.assertion: The login page checks context.IdP from GetAuthorizationContextAsync and bypasses the login UI when an IdP hint is present
assertions.rationale: Checks context?.IdP and issues a Challenge to skip UI.

assertions.assertion: The login page performs email-domain-based routing, sending @contoso.com users to the AAD provider
The spa.app client is configured with IdentityProviderRestrictions that includes 'Google' and excludes 'AAD'
The login page issues a Challenge to the appropriate external provider scheme when HRD determines the provider
assertions.rationale: Both paths issue Challenge with the appropriate scheme.
